add-filled-arc-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Filled Arc to PDF Graph
add-filled-arc-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a Graph container, and draw a filled arc with a custom RGB color.

add-unfilled-arc-with-custom-line-width-.title: Add Unfilled Arc with Custom Line Width and Dash Style
add-unfilled-arc-with-custom-line-width-.description: Demonstrates how to draw an unfilled arc on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, configuring its line width and dash pattern.

add-filled-circle-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Circle to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
add-filled-circle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a graph container, draw a filled circle with a border, and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.

create-bezier-curve-pdf.title: Create Bezier Curve in PDF
create-bezier-curve-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to draw a Bezier curve using four control points in a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and set its stroke color and line width.

add-filled-curve-with-opacity-to-pdf-gra.title: Add Filled Curve with Opacity to PDF Graph
add-filled-curve-with-opacity-to-pdf-gra.description: Demonstrates how to draw a Bezier curve inside a Graph, apply a semi‑transparent fill color and border thickness, and save the result as a PDF document.

draw-straight-line-in-pdf-graph.title: Draw Straight Line in PDF Graph
draw-straight-line-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, adding a Graph container, drawing a line with specified start and end points, setting its color and thickness, and saving the file.

add-multi-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-g.title: Add Multi-Colored Line Segments to a PDF Graph
add-multi-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-g.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document with a Graph container and adding multiple line segments of different colors to represent a continuous data series.

add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill-to-pdf-g.title: Add Rounded Rectangle with Fill to PDF Graph
add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill-to-pdf-g.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a Graph container, and inserts a rectangle with rounded corners and a solid fill color into the graph.

add-filled-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Dashed Rectangle to PDF Using Graph
add-filled-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, create a Graph, and add a rectangle with fill color, custom border width, and dash pattern, then save the result.

create-ellipse-in-pdf-graph.title: Create Ellipse Shape in PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
create-ellipse-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to draw an ellipse on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container, specifying horizontal and vertical radii and applying a stroke color.

add-filled-ellipse-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Filled Ellipse to a PDF Graph
add-filled-ellipse-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, draw an ellipse inside it, and apply a solid fill (with notes on gradient support).

add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.title: Add Centered Graph to PDF Page
add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a Graph, center it on a PDF page, add a simple rectangle shape, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-graph-align-left-margin.title: Add Graph to PDF Aligned to Left Margin
add-graph-align-left-margin.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, setting its left offset, title, and border, and inserting it into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-graph-dimensions-pdf.title: Set Graph Dimensions in PDF
set-graph-dimensions-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph object, setting its Width and Height properties, adding a matching rectangle shape, and saving the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-dimension-line-pdf.title: Create Dimension Line in PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
create-dimension-line-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Line classes to draw a dimension-specific line inside a PDF document.

add-rectangle-to-graph-pdf.title: Add Rectangle to a Graph in a PDF
add-rectangle-to-graph-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, and draw a rectangle with specific dimensions and styling inside that graph.

check-adjust-shape-bounds.title: Check and Adjust Shape Bounds in PDF
check-adjust-shape-bounds.description: Demonstrates how to verify whether a rectangle shape fits within a PDF page, and reposition it if it exceeds the page bounds using Aspose.Pdf.

log-graph-shape-bounding-boxes.title: Log Graph Shape Bounding Boxes in PDF
log-graph-shape-bounding-boxes.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page to find Graph objects, and logs the type of each shape along with whether its bounding box fits within the page dimensions.

rotate-graph-element-in-pdf.title: Rotate Graph Element in PDF
rotate-graph-element-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Graph container, add a rectangle shape, apply a rotation angle in degrees, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

translate-graph-element-in-pdf.title: Translate Graph Element Position in PDF
translate-graph-element-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding a rectangle shape, defining a placement rectangle, translating it with MoveBy, and positioning the graph on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

scale-graph-non-uniformly.title: Non‑Uniformly Scale Graph on X and Y Axes
scale-graph-non-uniformly.description: Demonstrates how to apply different scaling factors to a Graph container in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and adds a rectangle shape to visualize the effect.

skew-graph-x-axis.title: Skew Graph on X Axis in PDF
skew-graph-x-axis.description: Shows how to apply a skew transformation to a Graph container on the X axis and draw a rectangle inside it, creating a slanted visual effect in a PDF document.

apply-clipping-region-to-graph.title: Apply Clipping Region to Graph in PDF
apply-clipping-region-to-graph.description: Shows how to create a clipping rectangle with PDF operators and render a Graph so that its shapes appear only inside the defined area.

add-shadow-effect-to-rectangle.title: Add Shadow Effect to Rectangle in PDF Graph
add-shadow-effect-to-rectangle.description: Demonstrates how to create a rectangle with a simulated shadow inside a Graph container using Aspose.Pdf by drawing an offset semi‑transparent rectangle behind the main shape.

create-star-shape-in-pdf-graph.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF Graph
create-star-shape-in-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to generate a star-shaped Path with a configurable number of points, add it to an Aspose.Pdf Graph, apply fill and stroke colors, and save the document as a PDF.

add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Regular Hexagon to PDF Graph
add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a regular six‑sided polygon, set its border color and thickness, and add it to a Graph container in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf.

add-polygon-annotation-with-fill-and-das.title: Add Polygon Annotation with Fill and Dashed Outline to PDF
add-polygon-annotation-with-fill-and-das.description: Shows how to create a polygon annotation in a PDF, apply a solid fill color (as a placeholder for pattern fill) and set a custom dashed border using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-layered-graph-shapes.title: Create PDF with Layered Graph Shapes
create-pdf-with-layered-graph-shapes.description: Demonstrates how to add a layer (optional content group) to a PDF page and draw shapes inside a Graph container, allowing layer visibility control.

add-text-inside-graph.title: Add Text Inside a Graph with Font Settings
add-text-inside-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a graph, draw a rectangle shape inside it, and place styled text at specific coordinates on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-graph.title: Apply Background Image to PDF Graph with Overlaid Shapes
apply-background-image-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates setting a page background image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then creating a Graph object and adding shapes that are drawn on top of the background.

insert-rotate-scaled-image-pdf.title: Insert and Rotate Scaled Image in PDF
insert-rotate-scaled-image-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an external image, scale it proportionally to a target width, rotate it by a specified angle, and place it at the center of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-single-default-page.title: Create a PDF with a Single Default Page
create-pdf-single-default-page.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add one default‑size page, and save it using Aspose.Pdf.

create-full-page-graph.title: Create a Full-Page Graph and Add a Rectangle
create-full-page-graph.description: Demonstrates how to instantiate a Graph that matches the page dimensions of a PDF, add a rectangle shape to it, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rectangle-solid-red-fill-to-pdf-grap.title: Add Rectangle with Solid Red Fill to PDF Graph
add-rectangle-solid-red-fill-to-pdf-grap.description: Shows how to create a Graph, define a rectangle using absolute coordinates, apply a solid red fill, and place it on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

semi-transparent-ellipse-fill.title: Create Semi-Transparent Ellipse Fill in PDF
semi-transparent-ellipse-fill.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse on a PDF page and apply a semi‑transparent fill color using the ARGB alpha channel with Aspose.Pdf.

insert-centered-text-into-graph-rectangl.title: Insert Centered Text into a Graph Rectangle
insert-centered-text-into-graph-rectangl.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle using a Graph object and place a centered TextFragment inside it on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

validate-graph-shape-bounds.title: Validate Graph Shape Placement with BoundsCheckMode
validate-graph-shape-bounds.description: Shows how to enable BoundsCheckMode on an Aspose.Pdf Graph to ensure shapes fit within the graph area, handling overflow exceptions and saving the PDF.

catch-bounds-checking-exceptions.title: Catch Bounds Checking Exceptions for PDF Shapes
catch-bounds-checking-exceptions.description: Demonstrates how to enable bounds checking for vector shapes in an Aspose.Pdf Graph, catch the BoundsOutOfRangeException when a shape exceeds page limits, and log the offending coordinates.

add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.title: Add Non-Overlapping Rectangles to a PDF Graph
add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.description: Demonstrates placing multiple rectangles of varying sizes on a PDF graph while checking for overlaps using bounding‑box intersection logic.

add-rectangle-ellipse-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle and Ellipse Shapes to PDF Graph
add-rectangle-ellipse-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph container, adding rectangle and ellipse shapes with distinct fill and border styles, and embedding the graph into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save-to-f.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to File
export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save-to-f.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, writes it into a MemoryStream, and then copies the stream to a new file on disk.

add-graph-shapes-to-existing-pdf.title: Add a Graph with Shapes to an Existing PDF
add-graph-shapes-to-existing-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, add a new blank page, create a Graph, draw rectangle, ellipse and line shapes on it, and save the updated document.

add-graph-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Graph Watermark Rectangle to PDF Pages
add-graph-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: The example iterates over all PDF files in a folder, adds a Graph containing a rectangle watermark to each page, and saves the modified PDFs to an output folder.

add-gradient-ellipse-graphs-to-pdfs.title: Add Gradient Ellipse Graphs to PDFs in Parallel
add-gradient-ellipse-graphs-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to load PDF files, add a graph containing gradient‑filled ellipses to every page, and save the modified PDFs while processing multiple documents concurrently using Parallel.ForEach.

custom-graph-border-rectangle.title: Create Graph with Custom Border and Rectangle in PDF
custom-graph-border-rectangle.description: Shows how to configure a Graph's line width and dash pattern for its border, add a styled rectangle inside the graph, and save the result as a PDF.

set-rectangle-fill-opacity-argb.title: Set Rectangle Fill Opacity Using ARGB Color in PDF
set-rectangle-fill-opacity-argb.description: Shows how to create a rectangle in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a 50% transparent fill using an ARGB color value, verify the fill color, and save the document.

create-predefined-graph.title: Create Predefined Graph with Shapes for PDF Pages
create-predefined-graph.description: Shows how to build a reusable Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line that can be added to any PDF page.

create-graph-pdf-serialize-byte-array.title: Create Graph in PDF and Serialize to Byte Array
create-graph-pdf-serialize-byte-array.description: The example creates a PDF document, draws a simple line graph using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing, and then serializes the PDF into a byte array for network transmission.

deserialize-pdf-add-graph-with-label.title: Deserialize PDF and Add Graph with Text Label
deserialize-pdf-add-graph-with-label.description: Loads an existing PDF (or creates a new one), inserts a Graph containing a rectangle bar, adds a positioned text label, and saves the result.

toggle-graph-boundscheckmode.title: Toggle Graph BoundsCheckMode in Aspose.Pdf
toggle-graph-boundscheckmode.description: Demonstrates how to switch the Graph.BoundsCheckMode between throwing an exception for out‑of‑bounds shapes and the default ignore behavior based on a user setting, then adds a simple line shape to the graph.

create-bar-graph-with-legend.title: Create Bar Graph with Legend in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
create-bar-graph-with-legend.description: Generates a PDF report that contains a simple bar chart with colored rectangles for each data category and a corresponding legend indicating the category colors.

add-a-rectangle-with-rounded-corners-by-.title: Add A Rectangle With Rounded Corners By Specifying Corner Radius And Apply A Solid Fill

add-rotated-ellipse-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Ellipse to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-rotated-ellipse-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create an ellipse, rotate it 45 degrees, and insert it into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's graph and transformation APIs.

pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.title: Create a PDF Collage with Multiple Graphs
pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.description: Shows how to place several Graph objects at different coordinates on a single PDF page, combining rectangles, ellipses, and lines to form a collage using Aspose.Pdf.

simulate-clipping-with-graph.title: Simulate Clipping of Shapes Using Graph in PDF
simulate-clipping-with-graph.description: Demonstrates how to restrict drawing of shapes to a rectangular region by adding an invisible clipping rectangle and placing shapes inside an Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph container.

add-rectangle-with-alpha-gradient.title: Add Rectangle with Alpha Gradient Fill to PDF
add-rectangle-with-alpha-gradient.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangle in a PDF and apply a semi‑transparent fill using the alpha channel to simulate a gradient effect with Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-full-page-gra.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Full‑Page Graphs
create-multi-page-pdf-with-full-page-gra.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing several pages, each page holding a Graph object that matches the page's width and height using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-shape-bounds-logging.title: Validate Shape Bounds and Log Details in PDF
validate-shape-bounds-logging.description: The example shows how to manually check whether a rectangle fits within a PDF page, throw a custom exception when it does not, log detailed shape coordinates, and then add the shape to the page using Aspose.Pdf.

configure-shape-fill-color-from-file.title: Configure Shape Fill Color from File in PDF
configure-shape-fill-color-from-file.description: Shows how to read a color name from a configuration file, resolve it to an Aspose.Pdf.Color via reflection, and apply it as the fill color of a rectangle shape drawn with a Graph.

add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Dashed Rectangle to PDF Graph
add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, and draw a rectangle with a 2‑point border thickness and a dashed line style.

generate-pdf-with-overlapping-shapes.title: Generate PDF with Overlapping Shapes Using Graph
generate-pdf-with-overlapping-shapes.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, and draw overlapping rectangle and ellipse shapes. Shows where BoundsCheckMode would be applied for overlap prevention.

out-of-bounds-rectangle-throws-exception.title: Out‑of‑Bounds Rectangle Throws BoundsOutOfRangeException
out-of-bounds-rectangle-throws-exception.description: Demonstrates how to enable strict bounds checking on an Aspose.Pdf graph and verify that adding a rectangle larger than the container raises a BoundsOutOfRangeException using a unit test.

batch-insert-graph-with-logo.title: Batch Insert Graph with Logo into PDFs
batch-insert-graph-with-logo.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, add a Graph container with a rectangle shape, and place a company logo image inside each page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-graph.title: Create PDF with Graph in Memory
create-pdf-with-graph.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document in memory using a MemoryStream, add a simple graph with a rectangle shape, and return the result as a byte array.

add-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Graph to PDF Document
add-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating a Graph with rectangle and line shapes, inserting it into the first page, and saving the modified file via a command‑line tool.

create-pdf-proportional-graph-shapes.title: Create PDF with Proportional Graph Shapes on Each Page
create-pdf-proportional-graph-shapes.description: Shows how to generate a PDF where each page contains a graph with rectangles, ellipses, and lines sized and positioned proportionally to the page dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-fill-colors-to-shapes-pdf.title: Apply Fill Colors to Shapes Using a Dictionary
apply-fill-colors-to-shapes-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to map shape identifiers to colors with a dictionary and draw colored rectangles, ellipses, and lines in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container.

add-ellipse-with-centered-text.title: Add Ellipse with Transparent Fill and Centered Text
add-ellipse-with-centered-text.description: Demonstrates how to draw an ellipse with a semi‑transparent fill and a thick border, then place a centered TextFragment inside it on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-graph-shapes-and-text.title: Create PDF with Graph Shapes and Text Fragments
create-pdf-with-graph-shapes-and-text.description: Demonstrates how to add a Graph containing rectangle and ellipse shapes to a PDF and place text fragments with different fonts inside each shape.

scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.title: Scale Graph Shapes by 150% Using GraphInfo
scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 150 % scaling transformation to all shapes within an Aspose.Pdf Graph by setting GraphInfo scaling rates, then adds basic shapes and saves the PDF.

add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle with Shadow to PDF
add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle with a drop‑shadow effect in a PDF by placing a semi‑transparent offset rectangle behind the main shape.

create-pdf-graph-border-colors-lookup.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors from Lookup Table
create-pdf-graph-border-colors-lookup.description: Generates a PDF containing a graph with rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes whose border colors are retrieved from a dictionary lookup table.

add-graph-to-pdf-footer-using-margins.title: Add Graph to PDF Footer Using Margins
add-graph-to-pdf-footer-using-margins.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, setting its margin and horizontal alignment, placing it in the page footer, and saving the PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

create-horizontal-bar-chart-pdf.title: Create Horizontal Bar Chart in PDF
create-horizontal-bar-chart-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a simple horizontal bar chart by adding rectangle shapes to a Graph with Aspose.Pdf.

apply-texture-brush-to-ellipse.title: Apply Texture Brush to an Ellipse in PDF
apply-texture-brush-to-ellipse.description: Shows how to fill an ellipse with a texture pattern by positioning an ImageStamp over the shape using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-graph-filled-outline-shapes.title: Create PDF Graph with Filled and Stroke‑Only Shapes
create-pdf-graph-filled-outline-shapes.description: Shows how to add a Graph to a PDF page and draw rectangles and ellipses with both fill colors and stroke‑only rendering using Aspose.Pdf.

export-graph-to-pdf.title: Export Graph to PDF Document
export-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, add a Graph containing a rectangle shape, and save it as a new PDF file.

create-semi-transparent-rectangle-graph.title: Create Semi‑Transparent Rectangle with Graph in PDF
create-semi-transparent-rectangle-graph.description: Demonstrates how to add a graph container to a PDF page and draw a semi‑transparent rectangle using GraphInfo settings.
